rationale: No FU01D protection/charm/ward rows are accepted as covered. Rust reducer/adapter replay remains useful diagnostic substrate, but copied cleanroom inputs contain only route vocabulary plus selected drivers; they do not contain an executable generic protection/charm/ward QNT connector substrate. Every row is explicitly target-blocked until that copied-QNT/source connector exists.

targetBlockedRows.reason: copied source-QNT route inventory still treats generic protection/charm/ward route rows as source-QNT corpus blockers; the cleanroom inputs provide route vocabulary and Rust diagnostic replay, but no executable copied-QNT generic connector substrate
